verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I cannot tell thee whence it came. This peace within my breast; But this I know, there fills my soul A strange and tranquil rest.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There's a deep, settled peace in my soul, There's a deep settled peace in my soul; Tho' the billows of sin near me roll, He abides, Christ abides.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Beneath the toil and care of life, This hidden stream flows on; My weary soul no longer thirsts, Nor am I sad and lone.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I cannot tell the half of love, Unfeigned, supreme, divine, That caused my darkest in-most self With beams of hope to shine.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I cannot tell thee why He chose To suffer and to die, But if I suffer here with Him I'll reign with Him on high.
